sections.sectionTitle: Solomon in Thuciamna Biakinn sungah Paipih

verses.text: Tua ciangin Solomon in Zion a kici David khuapi panin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn sungah a paipih dingin Jerusalem khuasung ama kiangah Israel upate leh minam lutang, Israel beh makaite a khawm hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite khempeuh a kha sagihna Ethanim kha sunga pawi hunin Kumpi Solomon kiangah kikhawm uh hi
Israel upate khempeuh hong pai uh a, siampite in Thuciamna Singkuang la-in Biakinn-ah paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in kikhopna buk, leh puanbuk sunga om a siangtho nazatte khempeuh a paipih uh hi. Siampite leh Levi mite in tuate paipihto uh hi
Thuciamna Singkuang mai-ah a kikhawm Kumpi Solomon leh Israel mihonte khempeuh in biakna-in tuu leh bawngtalte tampi tak pia uh ahih manin tuate a phazah kisim zolo hi
Tua ciangin siampite in a kherub-te' kha nuai, siangthopen munsung, biakinn sungnung lama ama munah Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang paipih uh hi
Kherub-te in Thuciamna Singkuang omna mun tungah a kha uh zak ahih manin Thuciamna Singkuang leh a zawlte tungah kherub-te in khuhna piangsak uh hi
A zawlte sau mahmah ahih manin biakinn sungnung mai siangtho mun panin a zawl mongte kimu a, ahih hangin a pualam panin kimu theilo hi. Tuni dongin tua san takah tuate om hi
Tua Thuciamna Singkuang sungah, Egypt gam panin a paikhiat lai-un Topa in Israel mite tawh thuciamna a bawlna Horeb-ah Moses in suangpeek nih a koih simloh bangmah dang omlo hi
Siangtho mun panin siampite a paikhiat ciangin meii in Topa' biakinn tuam a
meii hangin siampite nasem dingin om theilo uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa' minthan'na vang in Topa' biakinn a tuam hi.
Tua ciangin Solomon in, “ Topa in vantungah ni koih khin a, ahih hangin khuamial sahpi sungah amah a ten' ding gen khin hi
Keimah in nangma-a' dingin a kipahtawi mun khat, na ten' tawntungna ding biakinn khat ka lam khin hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte a din' laitakin kumpipa in en kawikawi-in Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha a pia hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “‘Egypt panin ka mi Israel-te ka paikhiatpih-a kipanin keima min a om theihna dingin biakinn khat lamna ding Israel minam khempeuh sungah khuapi khat zong ka teel kei hi. Ahih hangin ka mi Israel-te tungah a uk dingin David ka teel hi,’ ci-in ka pa David tungah a kam tawh a ciamsa a tungsak Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
Israel Pasian, Topa' min dingin biakinn khat lam ding ka pa David' lungsim sungah om ngei hi
Ahih hangin Topa in ka pa David kiangah, ‘Keima min dingin biakinn khat lam ding na lungsim sungah a omna thu a hoih mahmah ahi hi
Ahi zongin nangmah in a biakinn na lam kei ding a, nangma sung pan hong suak ding na tapa in ka min dingin biakinn a lam ding hi,’ a ci hi

Tu-in ama bawlsa thuciamna Topa in tungsak khin hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh ka pa David' munah keimah khangin, Topa' ciamsa bangin Israel kumpi tokhom tungah ka tu a, Israel Pasian, Topa' min dingin a biakinn ka lam khin hi
Amah in Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpih lai-in amah in i pu i pate tawh a bawl Topa' thuciamna a omna Thuciamna Singkuang-a' dingin tua lai-ah mun khat ka bawlsak hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh a omna Topa' mai-ah Solomon ding a, vantung lamah a khutte zak hi

Amah in, “Israel Pasian, Topa aw, tunga om vantung ahi a, nuai-a om leitungah ahi zongin, nangma mai-ah a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh a gamta na nasemte tungah thuciamna lenin itna kip a lak, nang tawh a kibang pasian omlo hi
Na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu na kipsak hi. Nangmah in na kam tawh na gen a, tuni-in na tungsak hi

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian, Topa aw, ama tungah, ‘Keima mai-ah nang na gamtat mah bangin na tapate in keima mai-ah gamtat ding a kidop nak uh leh, Israel kumpi tokhom tungah a tu dingin keima mai-ah mi khat zong na tasam kei ding hi,’ ci-in na nasem ka pa David tungah na ciamsa thu lenkip in
Tua ahih ciangin tu-in Israel Pasian aw, na nasem ka pa David tungah na gensa thu kipsak in

“Ahih hangin leitungah Pasian teng taktak ding ahi hiam? Vantung leh vantung a sangpen in nang hong huam zolo hi. Tua ahih manin keima lamsa hih biakinn in bangzahin nang hong huam zolo zaw kan ding ahi hiam
Ahi zongin na nasempa' thungetna leh a hong thumna hong don in la, Topa ka Pasian aw, tuni-in nangma mai-ah na nasempa in a hong ngetna, a kikona leh a thungetna hong ngai in
‘Tua lai-ah ka min om ding hi,’ na cihna mun hih biakinn lamah sun leh zanin na mit hak in la, na nasempa in hih mun lamah a thungetna hong za in
Amaute in hih mun lamah hong nget uh ciangin na mi Israel-te' hong thumna zong ngai in. Na ten'na mun vantung panin hong za in la, ka mawhna uh hong maisak in
“Mi khat a vengpa tungah khialin, amah a kiciamsak a, amah hong pai-in hih biakinn sung nangma biakna tau mai-ah a kiciam leh

nangmah in vantung panin za-in gamta in la, na nasemte thu khen in la, a mawhpa thuak sakin ama lu tung mahah ama gamtatna tungsak in la, a dikpa a dikna langsakin ama dikna tawh kizui-in thaman pia in

“Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin galte mai-ah na mi Israel-te a guallelh ciangin, amaute nang lamah hong kihei kikin nangma min hong phawk a, hih biakinn sungah thu ngenin nang tungah hong thum uh leh
vantung panin za-in na mi Israel-te' khialhna maisak in la, a pu a pate uh tungah na piak leitangah amaute paipih kik in
“Nangma tungah hong khialhna hangin vantung kikhakcipin guah a zukloh ciangin, amaute in hih mun lamah thu ngenin na min hong phawk a, amaute na gimsak ciangin amau' khialhna panin a kihei uh leh
vantung panin za-in na mi Israel, na nasemte' khialhna maisak in la, amaute' zuih ding lampi hoih hilh in la, na mite tungah gamh-in na piaksa leitang tungah guah zusak in

“Gam sungah kialpi tungin, pulnatna ahi a, ankung natna ahi a, ankung zawngkhalna ahi a, kauphe ahi a, lung ahi zongin a om a, amau' khuapi khat peuhpeuh a galte un umcihin, bangbang gimna, bangbang natna hita leh
mi khatpeuh ahi a, na mi Israel-te khempeuh in ahi zongin amau' lungsim natna thei-in hih biakinn lamah a khutte hong zanin bangbang thungetna hita leh bangbang thumna hita leh hong bawl uh leh

na ten'na vantung panin za-in maisak in. Tua ciangin amau' gamtatna khempeuh tawh kizui-in a lungsim uh na theih bangin amaute tungah pia ciat in (bang hang hiam cih leh nang, nang bek in mihing khempeuh lungsim na thei hi
Tua hi leh ka pu ka pate uh tungah na piak leitang tungah a nuntak hun sung khempeuh uh amaute in nang hong zahtak ding uh hi
Tua mah bangin na mi Israel a hilo gamdang mi khat nangma min hangin a gamlapi panin hong pai-in
(bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in a lian nangma minthan'na leh nangma mite-a' dingin na sepsak na liante' thu za ding uh hi), hih biakinn lamah thu hong nget ciangin

na ten'na vantung panin za in la, tua gamdang mipa in nang tungah hong ngetna khempeuh tawh kizui-in hih in. Nangma mi Israel-te mah bangin leitung mi khempeuh in na min thei-in nang hong zahtakna ding, leh hih ka lamsa biakinn pen nangma min tawh a kilo ahihna a theihna ding uh ahi hi
“A galte uh a do dingin na mite kuankhia-in, bangbang lamah amaute sawl hita lecin, nangmah in na teelsa khuapi lam, Topa' tung leh nangma min dingin ka lamsa biakinn lamah thu hong nget uh ciangin
amau' hong thungetna leh hong thumna vantung panin za-in amau' vai huh in

“Amaute nang tungah hong khialin — bang hang hiam cih leh mi a khiallo kuamah omlo hi — amaute tungah nang heh a, galte tungah amaute pia-in, amaute kimanin a galte' gam a gamla ahi a, a nai-ah ahi zongin kipuakhia a

ahi zongin amaute a kipuak khiatna leitangah amaute in a lungsim uhah thu ngaihsunin kisik kik a, ‘Kote khialin lampialin ka gitloh tat uh hi,’ ci-in amaute a mante' leitang panin nang tungah hong thum uh a

amaute manin a puakhia a galte uh leitangah a ngaihsutna khempeuh uh leh a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh amaute kisik kikin, nangmah in na teelsa khuapi, amau' pute pate' tungah na piaksa amau' leitang, leh nangma min dingin ka lam biakinn lam nga-in nangma tungah thu hong nget uh leh
vantung na ten'na mun panin amau' hong thungetna leh hong thumna za-in, amau' vai huh in

Nang tungah hong khial na mite leh nang tunga hong gamtatna uh amau' thupalsatnate khempeuh maisakin, a galte un amaute tungah hehpihna a neih theihna dingun amaute manin a puakhia mite' muhna-ah amaute hehpih in
(Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute pen Egypt panin na paikhiatpih, sik meiphual sung panin na paikhiatpih nangma mi leh nangma luah ahi uh hi
Na nasempa' hong thumna leh na mi Israel-te' hong thumna-ah maipha tawh hong en tawntung in la, nang hong sap peuhmah uh ciangin amaute na bil na ngat in
Egypt panin ka pate uh na paikhiatpih lai-in na nasempa Moses tung tawnin na gen bangin nangma luah ahi dingin leitung mi khempeuh lak panin amaute na tengkhia hi, Topa Pasian aw,” a ci hi
Tu-in Solomon in hih thungetna leh thumnate khempeuh Topa' tungah a bawl khit ciangin, vantung lamah a khutte a zan sa-in a khukdin'na mun Topa' biakna tau mai panin amah dingto hi
Tua ciangin amah dingin awging pha tawh Israel a kikhawmte khempeuh thupha pia-in
“Ama hong ciamsa khempeuh tawh kizui-in ama mi Israel-te tungah tawlngakna a pia Topa in thupha ngah ta hen! A nasempa Moses tung tawnin a gensa ama thuciam hoihte khempeuh kam khat zong maimawklo hi
I pu i pate a ompih mah bangin Topa i Pasian in eite hong ompih hen la, eite hong nusia kei hen la, hong taisan kei hen
Amah in i pu i pate a thupiaksa ahi ama lampi khempeuh a zui ding, leh ama thupiaknate, a thukhamte, leh a ngeina kipte a zui dingin ama lamah i lungsim hong awnsak hen
Topa' mai-ah ka thumna kammalte sun leh zanin Topa i Pasian in hong za hen la, nisimin a kisam bangin a nasempa' vai leh ama mi Israel-te' vai hong huh ta hen
Tua hi leh mi khempeuh in Topa pen Pasian hi, ci-in thei ding uh a, kuamah dang a omlohna phawk ding uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa i Pasian' tungah na lungsim khempeuh uh tawh thuman un la, tuni-a bangin ama thukhamte zui-in a thupiaknate mang un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa leh amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa' mai-ah biakna a pia uh hi
Solomon in thunuama biakna-in Topa' tungah bawngtal tul sawmnih leh tul nih leh tuu tul za khat leh tul sawmnih a pia hi. Tua bangin kumpipa leh Israel mi khempeuh in Topa' biakinn a ap uh hi

Tua ni mahin kumpipa in Topa' biakinn mai-a om inntual laizang ap hi; bang hang hiam cih leh meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna leh thunuama biakna a thaute a tazo dingin Topa' mai-a sumngo biakna tau neulua ahih manin tua lai-ah meihal biakna leh an tawh biakna leh thunuama biakna thaute a pia hi
Tua hi a, tua hun lai-in Solomon leh amah tawh a om Israel mi khempeuh in Topa i Pasian' mai-ah ni sagih sung, Hamath khua lutna panin Egypt lui dong kikhopna lianpi khat bawlin pawi khat kham uh hi

A ni giat ni-in amah in mite ciahsak hi. Amaute in kumpipa thupha pia uh a, Topa in a nasempa David leh ama mi Israel-te tungah hoihna a lahnate khempeuh hangin lungdamna leh lungsim kipahna tawh a inn ciat uhah a ciah uh hi.
